a:r.a:t: Q6: I am comfortable with my mix of commissions vs. bonus pay.

Note: Average scores reflect the weighted mean of responses on a 5-point Likert scale (5 = Strongly Agree to 1 = Strongly Disagree), based on the distribution of all responses within each grouping. Neutral responses are included in the scoring as “3” but are excluded from the chart.
Perception of pay mix across functions is polarized, with Sales showing the least satisfaction
Perception often improves with seniority, with managers and directors more comfortable with the pay mix than frontline sellers
